updates.title: ChatGPT expands team memory controls for shared workspaces
updates.body: Team admins can now define which memory sources agents may reuse across shared workspaces, making long-running project context more predictable for analysts and product leads.

updates.title: Claude adds long-running agent checklists for team reviews
updates.body: Agent tasks can pause at required checkpoints, letting research or product teams review steps before execution continues.

updates.title: Perplexity launches collections for recurring market scans
updates.body: Collections group search threads, saved sources, and weekly outputs into repeatable intelligence workflows for research teams.

updates.title: Notion AI adds project brief generation inside docs
updates.body: Project briefs can now summarize goals, risks, owners, and follow-up tasks directly from workspace context.

updates.title: Cursor adds background agents for repo maintenance
updates.body: Background agents can handle dependency cleanups, repeated lint fixes, and lightweight repository upkeep while developers keep coding.

updates.title: Devin adds reviewer inboxes for agent handoffs
updates.body: Agent output can now route into a reviewer inbox where humans inspect work, comment, and relaunch the workflow if needed.

updates.title: Gemini adds an agent mode for cross-app actions
updates.body: Agent mode coordinates Gmail, Docs, and Calendar steps so users can trigger multi-app workflows from one prompt.

updates.title: Figma AI launches design critique agents for teams
updates.body: Critique agents review layouts, identify issues, and route findings back into collaborative design workflows.
